summary: The vaccine for preventing tooth decay should primarily target inducing large amounts of IgG antibodies, given their prolonged presence providing consistent protective coverage; however, local defenses using IgA are also important but not central enough alone justifying exclusive reliance solely upon them without complementation broader immune system’s capabilities represented chiefly
